content.en:
Ye Tian got this piece of information, asked the Lord of Xinyang to leave, and slowly looked at it by himself.

There are hundreds of treasure lands recorded on it, all of which are treasure lands that are of great help to the peak Legendary Realm lord, and there are still quite a few of them.

Among them, Sunrise Mountain is impressively listed, but it is only ranked 32nd.

These treasures are occupied by one force or strong person, and some forces have eternal controllers behind them, so no one dares to snatch them.

For example, the Time Merchant House, and the Qinglian Holy Land.

No one dares to offend these forces with eternal control, not even the white-bearded old man.

Therefore, Ye Tian naturally did not dare to pay attention to these treasures.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's gaze locked on a treasure land.

Infinite Mountain!

Ye Tian knew that Wuliang Mountain was occupied by the Lord of Wuheng, as the headquarters of the Holy Land of Wuheng Holy Land, and Wuliang Mountain was actually a treasure land, and "Zero One Zero" was the only treasure land in the Wuliang Sea that was of great use to the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Moreover, this information tells a detailed introduction to Mount Wuliang.

There are three major opportunities in Wuliang Mountain, one is the Wuliang Tree, which will bear an immeasurable fruit every other eternal era, and the immeasurable fruit is of certain help to the peak Legendary Realm Lord, which can increase understanding and improve willpower, but if you take too much, the effect will be very low.

The second great opportunity is the Infinite Heaven and Earth, which is a mysterious heaven and earth within the Infinite Mountain, which can help the Peak Legendary Realm Lord practice the top supreme technique and the time and space supreme technique

It's a pity that the talent of the Lord of Impermanence is average, and he wasted this treasure land, if he is replaced by other peak Legendary Realm Lords, I am afraid that he has already created many top-notch supreme techniques with the help of Infinite Heaven and Earth, and he will not be at the bottom of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord level

The third opportunity is the Infinite Stone, which is rich in a kind of Infinite Stone, and the Infinite Stone is very valuable, and it can be integrated into the Eternal Treasure and improve the level of the Eternal Treasure

For example, if the lower Eternal Arcana is fused with a large number of Infinite Mountains, it can be promoted to the middle Eternal Arcana

For the Legendary Realm Lord, the value of the Median Eternal Arcana is also very high.

It's a pity that the Immeasurable Stone can't elevate the Median Eternal Arcana to the Upper Eternal Arcana, otherwise the value of the Immeasurable Stone would be even higher.

"The treasure land of Wuliang Mountain is ordinary, far inferior to Black Saint Mountain!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, if the treasure land of Wuliang Mountain is comparable to the Black Holy Mountain, it will not be able to keep it with the strength of the Lord of Impermanence!

It is precisely because Wuliang Mountain is useful to the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, but it is not too useful, so after the Wuheng Lord occupies it, other Peak Legendary Realm Lords will not come to snatch it.

"It just so happens that I have a conflict with Lord Wuheng, so let's occupy Wuliang Mountain. "

Ye Tian decided.

......

Infinite sea, infinite mountain.

The essence of the Lord of Impermanence was cultivating in the Infinite Heaven and Earth, and suddenly the time and space of the Infinite Mountain shook, causing a warning from the Great Array of the Impermanence Holy Land.

"Peak Legendary Realm Lord!"

Lord Wuheng came out immediately.

He also thought that it was a certain peak Legendary Realm lord who came to visit, but when he sensed it, he found that it was Ye Tianmi's Legendary Realm Lord.

"Endless Lord, it's you, you are not welcome in the Holy Land of Impermanence!"

Lord Wuheng expelled in a loud voice.

Ye Tian directly announced: "Lord Wuheng, I want Wuliang Mountain, and you can choose another place as the headquarters of the Wuheng Holy Land. "

When Lord Wuheng heard this, he was immediately furious

"Endless Lord, you are too arrogant, you dare to spy on my Immortal Holy Land, although you are also the peak Legendary Realm Lord, but you have only just broken through for a short time, and this is my home field!"

Rumble!!!!

A doppelganger of the Lord of Impermanence descends.

At this time, the body of the Lord of Impermanence plus three clones, and the combat power of the four peak Legendary Realm Lords were all present.

Meanwhile.

The Great Array of the Wuheng Holy Land was also controlled by the Lord of Wuheng, which increased his strength a lot.

In this way, the Lord of Impermanence is full of confidence.

Even if he couldn't resist the alliance of Ye Tian and the Lord of the Underword, would the True Saintless Land really dare to start a war with the Immortal Holy Land?

He didn't have a friend of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, and when it really came time to fight to the death, he would also ask for help.

Therefore, he thought that Ye Tian would not dare to really make a move.

However, he miscalculated.

Ye Tian really made a move!

I saw a purple hand instantly penetrate one of Lord Wuheng's clones, and the terrifying power erupted, instantly shattering Lord Wuheng's clone.

One hit kills!

Lord Wuheng's clone was killed, and he didn't even react, and he was stunned for a moment.

"The Most High-Tech !! of Time and Space"

He looked at Ye Tian in horror, revealing an incredulous gaze.

He couldn't have imagined that Ye Tian had actually comprehended the supreme technique of time and space, how did he do it?

Comprehending the supreme technique of time and space, it means that Ye Tian must have embarked on the road of time and space fusion, and the power of time and space control was born.

In other words, Ye Tian must have reached the third level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Most of those peak Legendary Realm lords in the Void Region are at the first level, and those who have reached the second level belong to a small number, and there are even fewer peak Legendary Realm lords who have reached the third level, and there are only a handful.......

Ye Tian is the third level, and he is the first level, and the gap between the two sides is two levels.

"The Endless Lord can kill me in seconds!"

"He just dealt with my clone, if he attacks my body, won't I just fall?

Lord Impermanence was terrified.

If he offended a first-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, he could also find a few friends to help.

However, he had offended the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the third level, and no one would come to help.

"Endless Lord, I will relocate the Impermanence Holy Land. "

Lord Wuheng confessed.

Compared with life, what is the Holy Land of Impermanence, and what is a treasure land, if it is gone, it will be gone.

He has an infinite lifespan, and he is at the peak level of the Void Region, except for a few peak Legendary Realm Lords like Ye Tian, he is almost invincible, and his life is very comfortable, so he naturally doesn't want to die.

"Ten minutes for you!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Lord Wuheng immediately took away his treasure trove and treasures.

Immediately, the order was given.

"The Holy Land of Impermanence, all members, all evacuate the Holy Land of Impermanence, the Holy Land of Impermanence will be relocated, and those who violate it will be permanently expelled from the Holy Land of Impermanence. "

The voice of the Lord of Impermanence spread throughout the Holy Land of Impermanence.

This order of the Lord of Impermanence made countless members of the entire Impermanence Holy Land stunned. 3.5

As a result, one by one the Legendary Realm Lords were asking the Lord of Wuheng.

"Lord Wuheng, why do you want to relocate?"

A Lord of the Legendary Realm.

"Don't ask, leave immediately, otherwise the Holy Land of Impermanence will not exist, and you and I will have to die!"

Lord Wuheng replied helplessly.

At this time, the Legendary Realm Lords also noticed Ye Tian's existence, and they guessed in their hearts one by one.

And the Blackwater Lord was shocked in his heart.

Once upon a time, Ye Tian was just a small person in his eyes, but now he can force Lord Wuheng to give up Wuliang Mountain.

It can be seen from this that Ye Tian's strength is afraid to surpass the Lord of Impermanence.

It's a pity that Ye Tian's brief battle with the Lord of Wuheng is at another level of time and space, and the Legendary Realm Lords don't know about it at all, otherwise they would be even more surprised.

The movement of the Impermanence Holy Land was very fast, and almost the entire Impermanence Holy Land was moved away in an instant.

In the blink of an eye, there is not a single building in the infinite mountain.
